auth.name: Your name
auth.guestTooltip: You're using Fable as a guest. Sign in to save your preferences across devices.
auth.nameTooLong: Name must be 50 characters or fewer
auth.emailTooLong: Email must be 254 characters or fewer
auth.passwordTooLong: Password must be 72 characters or fewer

kitchen.title: My Kitchen
kitchen.emptySubtitle: Add ingredients to get personalised recipes
kitchen.safeHeaderTitle: Which safe ingredients do you have today?
kitchen.safeHeaderDesc: Pick from your safe list — recipes will use only these ingredients
kitchen.regularHeaderDesc: Add the ingredients you have and we'll find matching recipes
kitchen.addMoreFromSafe: Add more from your safe list:
kitchen.noExtras: No extras — recipes use exactly what you've added
kitchen.servingWarning: You may not have enough {items} for {count} servings
kitchen.servingWarningNote: Consider reducing servings or adding more
kitchen.safeFoodsFooter: Recipes will use only ingredients from your safe foods list
kitchen.regularFooter: We'll find recipes that match your ingredients and avoid your allergens
kitchen.photoRateLimitError: You've used your AI calls for this hour. Resets at {time}.
kitchen.photoNotSetupError: Photo recognition isn't set up yet
kitchen.photoCantReadError: Couldn't read that photo — try better lighting or a closer shot
kitchen.photoNoIngredientsError: No ingredients found — try a clearer photo
kitchen.photoHeicError: HEIC photos aren't supported on desktop — use your phone camera or convert to JPEG first
kitchen.photoGenericError: Something went wrong — please try again

recipe.title: Recipe
recipe.loadingHint1: Safe ingredients. Bold flavours. Food for everyone.
recipe.loadingHint2: Fable uses Epicure — the largest multilingual food embedding model ever built.
recipe.loadingHint3: The more you cook with Fable, the better it knows your taste.
recipe.regenerate: Start fresh with a new recipe
recipe.containsDairy: Contains dairy — consider taking Lactaid before eating.
recipe.lowHistamineBanner: Low histamine filter active — this recipe avoids common histamine triggers. Always consult a healthcare professional for medical advice.
recipe.alcoholBanner: This recipe may contain alcohol — check ingredients before cooking.
recipe.macrosDisclaimer: Estimated values only. Not a substitute for professional dietary advice.
recipe.whySafe: Why is this safe for me?
recipe.whySafeGuest: Sign in to see why this recipe is safe for you
recipe.communityRecipe: You're seeing a community recipe — Sign in to generate a personalised recipe with AI.
recipe.noMatchingRecipes: No matching recipes found — Sign in to Fable
recipe.noMatchingRecipesDesc: We couldn't find a community recipe that matches your requirements. Sign in to generate a personalised recipe with AI.
recipe.emptyDesc: Go to the Kitchen tab, add your ingredients, and generate a recipe.
recipe.errorDesc: Something went wrong while creating your recipe. Please try again.
recipe.noRecipesFoundDesc: Try adding different ingredients or adjusting your allergen preferences.
recipe.whySafeExplainer: Why this is safe for you 🛡️
recipe.rateLimitBannerText: You've used your AI calls for this hour. Resets at {time}. While you wait, here's a community recipe.
recipe.feedbackThanksNegative: 👎 Thanks, we'll do better next time.
recipe.signInForNutrition: Sign in to see nutritional information.

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Trending this week · safe for you
discover.flavourTerritoryTooltip: Ingredients that sit close to everything you love — found by mapping what your favourite flavours have in common.
discover.noDataYet: No data yet — like some recipes to see trends.
discover.allHidden: All sub-sections are hidden. Turn them on in Settings.

substitutes.title: Substitutes
substitutes.noIngredientsSubtitle: Add ingredients to your kitchen first, then come back to find substitutes.
substitutes.ingredientsPlaceholder:
One ingredient per line, e.g:
1 pound ground beef
2 cups salsa
3 cloves garlic
substitutes.noSubFoundNote: contains {allergen}, no suitable substitute found — will be omitted
substitutes.unresolvedNote: Allergen ingredients with no safe substitute will be omitted from the recipe.
substitutes.tapToFind: Tap an ingredient to find substitutes
substitutes.tapToSwap: Tap another ingredient to swap instead
substitutes.signInForExplanation: Sign in to see why this substitution works.
substitutes.rateLimit: You've used your AI calls for this hour. Resets at {time}.

history.emptySubtitle: Generate your first recipe to see your history here.
history.signInForHistory: Sign in to keep your history across sessions

saved.title: Saved Recipes
saved.emptySubtitle: Generate your first recipe and save ones you love.

collections.title: Collections
collections.emptySubtitle: Save recipes here to build your collection.
collections.noCollectionsYet: No collections yet. Create one below.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccount: Delete my account and all data
settings.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete your account, kitchen, saved recipes, taste profile, and all personal data. This cannot be undone.
settings.tabsMinimum: At least 2 tabs must remain visible.
settings.accountDeleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
settings.accountGuest: You're using Fable as a guest. Sign in to create an account — your current kitchen and preferences will carry over.
settings.macrosDesc: Calories, protein, carbs and fat per serving
settings.macrosHiddenDesc: Calorie and macro information is hidden by default out of respect for users in eating disorder recovery.
settings.safeFoodsModeDesc: For MCAS, severe allergies, or highly restricted diets. Build a list of ingredients you can safely eat and we'll generate recipes exclusively from it.

discover.showDiscoverDesc: Trending insights above the generation flow
discover.showTrendingForYouDesc: Recipe types popular with your allergen profile
discover.showTrendingGloballyDesc: Most liked ingredients across all users
discover.showMostLovedDesc: All-time top ingredients for your profile

settings.deleteSomethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
settings.deleteSuccessToast: Your account and all data have been permanently deleted.

onboarding.spiceHeading: How do you feel about spice?
onboarding.safeFoodsDescPost: eat and we'll work only within those ingredients — nothing outside your safe list.
onboarding.safeFoodsIdealFor: Ideal for MCAS, severe allergies, or highly restricted therapeutic diets.
onboarding.safeFoodsSetUp: Yes, set up my safe foods list
onboarding.safeFoodsSkip: No thanks, continue to the app

welcome.title: Welcome to Fable
welcome.subtitle: Safe ingredients. Bold flavours. Food for everyone.

allergens.title: Your allergens
allergens.subtitle: Tell us what to avoid and we'll keep every recipe safe for you.

cookingStyle.title: Your cooking style
cookingStyle.subtitle: You can change these any time in settings.

kitchen.title: Your kitchen
kitchen.subtitle: Add what you have and we'll build recipes around it.

safeFoods.title: Safe Foods Mode
safeFoods.subtitle: For MCAS, severe allergies, or highly restricted diets. Define exactly what you can eat.

lactose.name: Lactose Intolerance
lactose.reminder: Dairy stays in recipes — you'll see a Lactaid reminder
lactose.exclude: Exclude dairy entirely — treats dairy like an allergen
lactose.title: Lactose Intolerance
lactose.inactive: Shows a Lactaid reminder on dairy-containing recipes
lactose.activeInclude: Dairy allowed — Lactaid reminder shown on recipes
lactose.includeDesc: Dairy stays in recipes — you'll see a Lactaid reminder
lactose.excludeDesc: Treats dairy like an allergen, filtered from all results

alcohol.name: No Alcohol
alcohol.description: Remove alcohol from recipes and pairings
alcohol.noCooking: Alcohol-free cooking — alcohol removed from recipes, alcoholic pairings hidden
alcohol.excludeEntirely: Exclude entirely — treats alcohol like an allergen, filtered from all results
alcohol.title: No Alcohol
alcohol.inactive: Remove or exclude alcohol from recipes and pairings
alcohol.noCookingDesc: Alcohol removed from recipes — cooking wine, beer, and spirits replaced with non-alcoholic alternatives. Alcoholic drink pairings hidden.
alcohol.excludeDesc: Treats alcohol like an allergen — filtered from all results including marinades, sauces, and flavourings. Alcoholic drink pairings hidden.

lowHistamine.name: Low Histamine
lowHistamine.description: Filters out high-histamine ingredients — fermented foods, aged cheeses, cured meats, alcohol, and common histamine triggers.
lowHistamine.disclaimer: This is a dietary filter based on common low-histamine guidelines. It is not medical advice. Always consult a healthcare professional for diagnosis and treatment of histamine intolerance or MCAS.

safeFoods.title: Safe Foods Mode
safeFoods.description: For MCAS, severe allergies, or highly restricted diets. Only ingredients on your safe list will appear in recipes.
safeFoods.addDesc: Add every ingredient you can safely eat. We'll work exclusively within this list.
safeFoods.searchToStart: Search above to start building your list

share.title: Share recipe
share.noLongerAvailable: This recipe is no longer available.
share.disclaimer: Drink pairings shown without allergen filtering — check ingredients carefully.

pairings.title: Flavour Pairings
pairings.safeBasedOnKitchen: Safe ingredient suggestions based on your kitchen
pairings.tip: Add ingredients to your kitchen, then generate a recipe from all of them together.
pairings.emptySubtitle: Try adding more ingredients or adjusting your allergen restrictions.
pairings.generateNote: Claude will craft a recipe using your kitchen ingredients and these pairings

visionReview.selectToAdd: Select what to add to your kitchen

welcome.headline: Most recipe apps weren't built for you.
welcome.body: Fable is different. Built for people with allergies, intolerances, and restricted diets — we keep you safe without compromising on flavour.

allergens.headline: Tell us what to avoid. Once.
allergens.body: Pick from the EU Big 14 allergens or search all 1,790 ingredients. We'll never suggest anything unsafe.

kitchen.headline: Add what you have. We'll build around it.
kitchen.body: Track your fridge, freezer and cupboards. Fable prioritises ingredients before they expire.

recipe.headline: Safe ingredients. Bold flavours.
recipe.body: Generate personalised recipes with AI — or browse community recipes as a guest. Sign in to unlock AI generation tailored to your taste.

safeFoods.headline: For highly restricted diets.
safeFoods.body: Define exactly what you can safely eat. Fable builds every recipe strictly within your safe list — no assumptions, no surprises.
